name: OpenClaw
description: The AI that actually does things
compose:
name: slashnode-openclaw
services:
  gateway:
    image: ghcr.io/getumbrel/openclaw-umbrel:2026.6.10
    container_name: openclaw
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    environment:
      APP_SEED: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - gateway_data:/data
      - gateway_data-linuxbrew:/home/linuxbrew
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:18789:18789
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  gateway_data:
    name: slashnode-openclaw_gateway_data
  gateway_data-linuxbrew:
    name: slashnode-openclaw_gateway_data-linuxbrew
